aggregate_summary.primary_summary_deduplication: deduped by unit/axis/source to avoid double-counting sigma-key duplicates in human_pref_proxy vectors

interpretation.cautious_claim: For ACE-Step short-form outputs, local-window rewards appear to track persistent global quality more than isolated local failures.
interpretation.overclaim_guard: Does not prove local failures never occur or that Section/window PRMs cannot help under other settings.

method_notes.between_share: between-song SS / (between-song SS + within-song SS) across local window values
method_notes.crossing_frequency: adjacent sign-change rate of top-minus-bottom time-bin gaps
method_notes.globalness_index_caveat: For the primary cells in this dataset, sign_consistency is 1.0 and crossing_frequency is 0.0, so the index is a monotone transform of between_share rather than independent evidence.
method_notes.sign_consistency: fraction of normalized time bins where top-quartile mean exceeds bottom-quartile mean
method_notes.top_bottom_curve_caveat: Top/bottom prompt groups are selected in-sample by prompt mean; gap magnitudes are descriptive, not predictive.
method_notes.unit_control_caveat: CU-MS and CU-NULL-rand-section share identical musicality and coherence value sets in the cached H3 artifact; CU-NULL is an informative control mainly for prompt_fit.
